SEARCH
Package io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.fabric

Class FabricEffectRuntime

java.lang.Object
io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.fabric.FabricEffectRuntime
public final class FabricEffectRuntime extends Object
Fabric scheduler chokepoint for the effects API.

Phase-1 scope per effects-api-ADR-003: this runtime exposes only the scheduling primitive needed to push an Effect run() onto the main server thread. Sound / particle / potion mechanics live inline in each concrete Fabric effect (mirroring the Bukkit-side pattern where SoundEffect#run() calls Player#playSound directly), because the concrete effect types already need Mojmap objects (SoundEvent, ParticleType, MobEffect) to do their work and routing those through the platform-neutral EffectRuntime SPI provides no decoupling benefit on the Fabric side.

S-005: schedule(java.lang.Runnable, long) forwards via BlockableEventLoop.execute(java.lang.Runnable), which enqueues onto the server's tick processor. Never blocks, never touches chunks.

The MinecraftServer reference is bound at server-start time by RTPFabricMod's ServerLifecycleEvents.SERVER_STARTED listener. Calls before binding (or after server stop) become no-ops with a single S-004-compliant diagnostic to System.err.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    FabricEffectRuntime.LogSink
    Receives diagnostic log messages from effects-api/fabric.
    static interface 
    FabricEffectRuntime.ParticleDispatcher
    Spawns particles at (x,y,z) for recipient (or broadcast to the level when implementations choose).
    static interface 
    FabricEffectRuntime.PotionDispatcher
    Builds and applies a MobEffectInstance to player.
    static interface 
    FabricEffectRuntime.SoundDispatcher
    Plays a sound directly to player.

  • Constructor Details

    • FabricEffectRuntime

      public FabricEffectRuntime()

    • FabricEffectRuntime

      public FabricEffectRuntime(boolean strict)
      Parameters:
      strict - if true, schedule(Runnable, long) throws on no-server-bound (test-friendly); if false it warns once to System.err and drops the task (production-friendly — RTP shouldn't crash if effects fire between disabling and JVM exit).

  • Method Details

    • setLogSink

      public static void setLogSink(@Nullable @Nullable FabricEffectRuntime.LogSink sink)
      Install a log sink. Pass null to revert to the silent default.

    • log

      public static void log(@NotNull @NotNull Level level, @NotNull @NotNull String msg)
      Internal helper; always non-null sink.

    • log

      public static void log(@NotNull @NotNull Level level, @NotNull @NotNull String msg, @Nullable @Nullable Throwable t)
      Internal helper; always non-null sink.

    • bindServer

      public static void bindServer(@NotNull @NotNull net.minecraft.server.MinecraftServer server)
      Bind the MinecraftServer reference. Idempotent; called from SERVER_STARTED.

    • unbindServer

      public static void unbindServer()
      Drop the binding on SERVER_STOPPING / SERVER_STOPPED.

    • server

      @Nullable public static @Nullable net.minecraft.server.MinecraftServer server()
      Returns:
      the bound server, or null if not yet started or already stopped.

    • schedule

      public void schedule(@NotNull @NotNull Runnable task, long delayTicks)
      Schedule a one-shot task on the server thread. delayTicks is accepted for API parity with the Bukkit side; Phase-1 ignores it (all effect runs go onto the next tick via BlockableEventLoop.execute(java.lang.Runnable)). A future slice can layer real tick-delay support via the existing FabricScheduler infrastructure if any concrete effect grows a scheduled-cancel use case.

    • registerSound

      public static void registerSound(@Nullable @Nullable FabricEffectRuntime.SoundDispatcher dispatcher)
      Register a sound dispatcher. The most-recent registration wins; passing null clears the registration and reverts to the in-tree default (typically the reflective fallback installed by FabricSoundEffect).

    • getSoundDispatcher

      @Nullable public static @Nullable FabricEffectRuntime.SoundDispatcher getSoundDispatcher()
      Returns:
      the currently registered sound dispatcher, or null.

    • registerParticle

      public static void registerParticle(@Nullable @Nullable FabricEffectRuntime.ParticleDispatcher dispatcher)
      Register a particle dispatcher. Same semantics as registerSound(io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.fabric.FabricEffectRuntime.SoundDispatcher).

    • getParticleDispatcher

      @Nullable public static @Nullable FabricEffectRuntime.ParticleDispatcher getParticleDispatcher()
      Returns:
      the currently registered particle dispatcher, or null.

    • registerPotion

      public static void registerPotion(@Nullable @Nullable FabricEffectRuntime.PotionDispatcher dispatcher)
      Register a potion dispatcher. Same semantics as registerSound(io.github.dailystruggle.effectsapi.fabric.FabricEffectRuntime.SoundDispatcher).

    • getPotionDispatcher

      @Nullable public static @Nullable FabricEffectRuntime.PotionDispatcher getPotionDispatcher()
      Returns:
      the currently registered potion dispatcher, or null.
